English Definition: The original pronunciation “á mé” of the characters means. Hoever, in HKHK, this pronunciation is obsolete for mother, but more as an exclamation. Sometimes it may be lengthened to say “á mĕzu3”, meaning “My God!”. If the pronunciation is just “á mĕ”, it means “Look!”.

In Chinese, the character “妹” means younger sister, but in Hakka it can be used to mean “child” of both genders. The younger sister is “la3u mòi” instead. The expression “á mòi” has two meanings: 1) Addressing a child on the street by an eldery, the pronunciation may be lengthened to  almost like “á mòi ói” 2) Talking of their own children between couples. e. “á mòi fa3t sa1u e3, go4 lo2i ko4n ha4”[阿妹發燒欸，過來看下] {Our child has fever, come and see”.
The palm of the hand to hit. e. g. “yi3t bá dăp pa1n go4 hi4” [一巴搭拌過去] {hit with the palm}, also spoken as “dăp ma2”[搭嫲].

The original meaning was very well fed and cause waste, but now it means waste, or not valuing something. “an2 ba3u zie3t? Ba4n za3k ga1i du1 do4ng lo3t so3t fi3t ho1i gi2?” [恁飽節？半隻雞都當垃圾拂嗨佢？{So wasteful, throwing away half a chicken as rubbish?}
Being mad, also spoken as “bot lo4t” [發捋], can also mean very angry.

Also spoken as “bŏt ta4i láng”, which was a colloquial term for malaria. It was used earlier as a curse word, but not it is mildened to a non-malicious nickname. .e.g Ngia1 za3k bŏt láng a2n za3u hi4 la4i le1? [惹隻發冷恁早去㖠哦] So early, whre are you going my friend?]
Loose the temper., Also known as bo3t sia4ng [發性].
Loose the temper. Also known as bo3t lo4 [發捋]
Orignial meaning is “plaque”. Now used to curse animals, especially cats or dogs. e.g. “Gia1  tia2u bo3t vu1n ge3u nga1u si3 nga1 tia2u mia4u” [其條發瘟狗咬死吾條貓]{His damned dog bit my cat to death}
Original meaning is “worse than”:, but the actual meaning is “almost”.  恁樣看等厓，差過厓係賊佬恁樣〔這樣看住我，幾乎把我當作賊一樣〕。

Chinese definition: 隨便，胡亂。例：恃懵填幾隻字就會中獎〔隨便填幾個字就會中獎〕。
English Definition: To act carelessly or randomly; doing things haphazardly.

Chinese definition: 一定會。例：考試唔讀書座硬唔及格〔考試不讀書肯定不及格〕。
English Definition: Definitely will; certainly bound to happen. E.g. 'Not studying for an exam will definitely result in failure.'

Chinese definition: 整齊，清楚。例：這件事厓都講唔伸差〔這件事我也說不清〕。
English Definition: Neat and clear; in order. Often used negatively as 唔伸差 (out of order, unclear).

Chinese definition: （打人的）巴掌。又作“巴搭”（見“巴搭”條）。
English Definition: A slap with the palm of the hand. Variant of 巴搭.

Chinese definition: 隨便，不經意。例：哎隻醫生鬥多看下就講愛三千銀〔那個醫生隨便看一下就說要三千元〕。
English Definition: Casually; without care or attention; carelessly.

Chinese definition: 求別人要。例：鬥當就唔抵錢〔求別人要就不值錢〕。
English Definition: To beg or solicit something from someone. 'What is begged for has no value.'

Chinese definition: 一丁點兒。又作滴息仔、滴哥仔。
English Definition: A tiny little bit; a very small amount. Also said as 滴息仔, 滴哥仔.

Chinese definition: 口頭禪，相當於：我呸。
English Definition: An exclamation equivalent to 'Pfft!' or 'Nonsense!' Used as a mild dismissive interjection.

Chinese definition: 事實上如此。例：當得做過就唔怕承〔事實上做過就不怕認〕。/當得係就係，唔好生安白做〔事實上是就是，不要無中生有〕。
English Definition: That's how it actually is; in fact; that is the truth. 'If you really did it, then don't be afraid to admit it.'

Chinese definition: 口頭禪，本義是騙鬼。但意思是“說鬼話、我才不信”。例：哄鬼呀！佢都有錢送賴子去英國讀書？〔說鬼話！他都會有錢送兒子去英國讀書？〕
English Definition: An exclamation of disbelief: 'Yeah right!' or 'You've got to be kidding me!' Lit. 'deceiving ghosts'.

Chinese definition: 全部加起來，總共，又作“摎總”。例：人工摎獎金夾總都冇一萬銀〔薪水跟獎金加起來都沒有一萬塊〕。
English Definition: All together; total. Synonymous with 摎總. E.g. 'Salary plus bonus altogether is less than ten thousand.'

Chinese definition: （做了）幾次（奶奶、爺爺、外公、外婆之類）。例：吾老妹吂到五十歲就做嗨幾面姐婆咯〔我妹妹沒到五十歲已經做了幾次外婆了〕。
English Definition: How many times (as grandparent, etc.). E.g. 'My younger sister hasn't turned fifty yet and has already been a grandmother several times.'

Chinese definition: 人人，每個人。例：見人都有份〔人人都有份〕。
English Definition: Everyone; every person. E.g. '見人都有份' – Everyone gets a share.

Chinese definition: 過魔本義是絕子絕孫的意思，本來是個詈語，但很多時候會用作朋友間的暱稱。例：惹隻過魔做乜介恁久都冇來吾屋下哦？〔你這個傢伙為何那麼久都沒來我家呀？〕，又作“過魔薯”。
English Definition: Lit. 'past demon' – originally a curse meaning 'may your lineage end'. Now used affectionately among friends. Also 過魔薯.

Chinese definition: 專門，特地（做一些令人不快的動作）。例：唔好戈門圖菜〔不要專門只吃菜〕。
English Definition: Specifically; deliberately (for doing something annoying). E.g. 'Don't specifically only eat the vegetables.'

Chinese definition: （病情等）比較好一點。例：佢今日過爭咯，正先還食得飯〔他今天好點了，剛才還吃過飯〕。
English Definition: A little better (of illness etc.). E.g. 'He is a bit better today; he even ate just now.'

Chinese definition: 啜是嘴巴的意思。“過啜”是說吃了一些口味重的東西，用糖果或者甜品來中和嘴巴中的感覺。例：食嗨條魚，愛食隻糖仔來過啜〔吃完了一條魚，要吃顆糖果來中和一下。〕。
English Definition: To neutralize a strong taste in the mouth with something sweet. 啜 = mouth. E.g. 'After eating fish, eat a candy to clear the palate.'

Chinese definition: 看看。例：你敢駁嘴看信？〔你敢頂嘴看看？〕
English Definition: Try it and see; just wait and see. E.g. 'You dare talk back? Just try it!'

Chinese definition: 讀書不聰明，一般當形容詞使用。例：佢細哎陣讀書好泥包，吂知今下做嗨大老闆〔他小時候讀書很差勁，怎知道現在做了大老闆〕。
English Definition: Not smart academically; poor student (used as adjective). E.g. 'Who knew the poor student turned out to be a big boss?'

Chinese definition: 以為。例：你恅過厓還細呀〔你以為我還小嗎〕？
English Definition: To think; to assume; to suppose. E.g. 'You think I'm still young?'

Chinese definition: 全部（字源不明）。惹幾隻人啉噤都細過厓〔你們幾個人全部都比我小〕。
English Definition: All; everyone; the whole lot (etymology uncertain). E.g. 'You few people, all of you are younger than me.'
怎樣？老派發音作ngiòng bién。但大部分人發音是liòng bién。

Chinese definition: （數目）不對。
English Definition: Incorrect (of a number or count).

Chinese definition: 隨便（副詞）。例：正先冇看清楚，麻理拿隻就走〔剛才沒看清楚，隨便拿個就走〕。
English Definition: Casually; at random (adverb). E.g. 'Didn't look carefully, just grabbed one and left.'

Chinese definition: 什麼都。例：等你拿得相機出來嘪都走揫啦〔等你拿照相機出來什麼都走光了〕。
English Definition: Everything; whatever. E.g. 'By the time you get the camera out, everything will be gone.'

Chinese definition: 疑問句：你說什麼？但語氣一般決定意義。比較輕的是“你說什麼，我沒聽到”。比較重（“呀”字提高聲調）的是“真的嗎？我不相信/我給這個消息嚇到了”。例：嘪呀，惹姐公姐婆舊年離嗨婚？〔什麼，你外公外婆去年離了婚？〕
English Definition: What did you say? (light tone); or: What?! / Seriously?! (heavy tone, expressing shock). E.g. 'What?! Your grandparents got divorced last year?!'

Chinese definition: 準備好（後面一定是動詞），通常是值得高興的事情。例：惹兩隻賴子都今年結婚，你咩拈便做阿公？〔你兩個兒子都今年結婚，你豈不是準備好做爺爺了？〕
English Definition: Ready to (do something pleasant); all set for. E.g. 'Both your sons are getting married this year – you're all set to be a grandfather!'

Chinese definition: 浪費。“嘥”字源不詳，可能借自廣州話。
English Definition: Wasteful; to waste. (嘥 possibly borrowed from Cantonese.)

Chinese definition: 死定，一般是誇張說法。例：後日考試乜介都還吂準備，這擺死梗咯〔後天考試什麼都還沒準備，這次死定了〕。
English Definition: Definitely done for; certainly going to fail (usually hyperbolic). E.g. 'Nothing prepared for tomorrow's exam – definitely dead.'

Chinese definition: 糟糕。例：死咯，原來厓冇帶鎖匙添〔糟糕，原來我根本沒帶鑰匙〕。“咯”發音為lŏk表示事態嚴重。發音為lŏ則比較輕微。
English Definition: Oh no! / Darn it! An exclamation of dismay. E.g. 'Oh no, I didn't bring my keys at all.' (咯 as lŏk = serious; as lŏ = mild).

Chinese definition: 饞嘴，喜歡吃。例：這隻年紀唔好恁死食，好容易食出病嘅呀〔這個年紀不要那麼饞嘴，好容易吃出病的呀〕。
English Definition: Greedy for food; gluttonous. E.g. 'At this age don't be so gluttonous, it's easy to eat yourself sick.'

Chinese definition: 少許、稍微。“纖西”是同音字，字源不詳。例：纖西有錢滴都唔會住在這裡。〔稍為有錢點也不會住在這裡〕。
English Definition: A little; slightly. E.g. 'Even slightly better off and they wouldn't live here.'

Chinese definition: 指人傻兮兮，大笑大哭的性格。例：其老婆正酸果，動到就哈哈大笑〔他老婆傻兮兮的，動不動就哈哈大笑〕。
English Definition: Slightly silly or scatterbrained; giggly and crying personality. E.g. 'His wife is a bit of a scatterbrain, always bursting into laughter.'

Chinese definition: 本指辦喪事的家庭。用作詈語罵人。例：厓正唔愛其幾隻喪家錢〔我才不要他那王八蛋的幾個錢〕。
English Definition: Lit. 'family in mourning' – used as a curse word. E.g. 'I'm not taking a single cent of his rotten money.'

Chinese definition: 肚子餓，飢不擇食。引申為猴急。
English Definition: Extremely hungry; ravenous. Extended meaning: overly eager or impatient.

Chinese definition: 肚子餓，飢不擇食。通常沒有引申義。
English Definition: Extremely hungry; ravenous. Usually without extended meaning.

Chinese definition: 順利。又作順溜順溜。例：係講嘪都恁順溜，厓五十歲就唔使做了〔什麼都那麼順利的話，我五十歲就不用幹了〕。
English Definition: Smoothly; without a hitch. Also 順溜順溜. E.g. 'If everything goes this smoothly, I won't need to work past fifty.'

Chinese definition: 快有暴風雨前悶熱的天氣。又比喻人發脾氣。
English Definition: Stuffy, oppressive weather before a storm. Also metaphor for someone about to lose their temper.

Chinese definition: 找藉口不工作。例：吾隻工人常日推懶，唔得佢葛煞〔我傭人常常找藉口偷懶，真拿他沒辦法〕。
English Definition: To make excuses not to work; to shirk duties. E.g. 'My worker always makes excuses to slack off.'

Chinese definition: 本義是一起，一齊。引申為性生活的委婉語。例：其兩公婆分房睡，冇同下幾年了〔他兩口子分房睡，沒夫妻生活幾年了〕。
English Definition: Lit. 'together down' – originally means 'together'; extended as a euphemism for marital intimacy. E.g. 'The couple has slept separately for years.'

Chinese definition: 非常鹹的食物。
English Definition: Extremely salty food.

Chinese definition: “冤枉”有三個意思，第一個跟標準漢語相同，如“分人冤枉”〔給人冤枉〕。第二個是很慘很可憐。第三個只是口頭禪，有點像“我的天”。例：冤枉，排隊排嗨三點鐘久都還吂到厓〔我的天呀，排隊排了三個小時都還沒到我〕。
English Definition: Three meanings: 1) wronged / unjust (same as Mandarin); 2) very pitiful; 3) exclamation like 'My goodness!' E.g. 'My God, I queued for three hours and still haven't reached my turn!'

Chinese definition: 倚仗。俗語有云：緊倚勢哎管鼻，撿到來餓絕氣。（見本章5.3）
English Definition: To rely on or exploit (power/backing). As in the proverb: 'The more you rely on your nose, the more likely it is to starve to death.'

Chinese definition: 諸如此類。例：你愛帶便兜紙寶蠟燭樣信過去拜惹公太〔你要準備帶些元寶蠟燭等過去拜你曾祖父〕。
English Definition: And so on; things like that; et cetera. E.g. 'You should bring ingots, candles, and the like to worship your great-grandfather.'

Chinese definition: 字面意義是裝死。引申為隱藏自己的實力或財富。
English Definition: Lit. 'pretend to be dead'. Extended: to hide one's true abilities or wealth.

Chinese definition: “正來”作為詞語有三個解釋：1) 一開始。例：佢正來都幾好嘅，黏尾緊做緊衰〔他一開始是不錯的，後來越做越差〕。2) 才，跟“正”相同。例：吾爸六十歲正來學英文。〔我爸爸六十歲才學英文〕3) 才來：厓今晚愛八點過外正來〔我今晚要八點鐘以後才來〕。
English Definition: Three meanings: 1) at first; in the beginning; 2) only then (equivalent to 才); 3) just now arriving. E.g. 'He was quite good at first but got worse and worse.'

Chinese definition: 有兩個意思，一是能工作，二是可以。例：惹隻病唔算嚴重，食嗨這兜丸仔就做得〔你的病不嚴重，吃了這些藥丸就可以〕。
English Definition: Two meanings: 1) able to work; 2) OK / acceptable. E.g. 'Your illness isn't serious, take these pills and you'll be fine.' Also used as euphemism for 'critically ill'.

Chinese definition: 女人賣弄風騷。
English Definition: A woman acting flirtatious or coquettish.

Chinese definition: 本義是想死，引申為該死、調皮的意思。例：其賴子好作死，滴咁大就曉撩妹仔〔他的兒子很調皮，年紀小小就會泡女孩〕。
English Definition: Lit. 'court death'; used as 'naughty, mischievous' (for children) or 'serves you right / that's asking for trouble'. E.g. 'His son is so naughty, young as he is already hitting on girls.'

Chinese definition: 添飯。例：愛轉添就自家去灶下舀飯〔要添飯就去廚房盛飯〕。
English Definition: To have a second serving (of rice). E.g. 'If you want more rice, go to the kitchen and help yourself.'

Chinese definition: 遺傳。例：其賴子有其種草，好會做生理〔他兒子有他的遺傳，很會做生意〕。
English Definition: Genetic inheritance; to take after (a parent). E.g. 'His son takes after him – very good at business.'

Chinese definition: 反正。例：總都係愛分錢，唔當住得好滴〔反正都要給錢，不如住得好點〕。
English Definition: Anyway; in any case. E.g. 'Anyway you have to pay, might as well stay somewhere nicer.'

Chinese definition: 詈語，罵人趕着去投胎。 【1】兩字熟語 二維碼1
English Definition: A curse: lit. 'hit by fate / going to die'. Used to scold someone.
